_description: Aerial / wide establishing shot of the location. Conveys scale of mystery. Strong for big-event content (e.g., Tunguska, Dyatlov pass).
prompt_template: Cinematic aerial drone-style photograph of {location_description} at {time_of_day}, {weather}, sepia + cold teal grade, sweeping perspective showing scale, low atmospheric haze, Fern documentary aesthetic, LEMMiNO color palette, 16:9 1280x720, clean negative space lower-third for text overlay, no text in image, no logos
style_notes: Use when location IS the iconic detail. Avoid when there's a single object/face that's more iconic.
